conj.statement: 7. Novel policy levers: 3 high-impact, high-uncertainty interventions
contradicting_evidence: Why unresolved?*: Residency programs can’t match archive capacity (e.g., Freiburg hosts 200/year; 12,000 teachers needed nationally).
Why unresolved?*: Vouchers (Subtopic 3) risk fragmenting standards if counties prioritize local narratives over methodological rigor.
Why unresolved?*: No mechanism to audit *methodological fidelity* in textbooks/teaching (e.g., a Cassirer-focused textbook may still teach "doctrinal" analysis).
